message:
src/app/unity-ai-infra-mgmt/preconfigured-ai-stack/preconfigured-ai-stack.component.ts:8:10 - error TS2459: Module '"./preconfigured-ai-stack.service"' declares 'AiStack' locally, but it is not exported.

8 import { AiStack, PreconfiguredAiStackService } from './preconfigured-ai-stack.service';
           ~~~~~~~

  src/app/unity-ai-infra-mgmt/preconfigured-ai-stack/preconfigured-ai-stack.service.ts:4:21
    4 import { AI_STACKS, AiStack, FILTER_CATEGORIES } from './preconfigured-ai-stack.constants';
                          ~~~~~~~
    'AiStack' is declared here.
